city.detective_dialog: DETECTIVE: "You think this is just a game?"
city.idoso_dialog: ELDER: "I've lived here since Marélia was just a village. A lot has changed..."
city.crianca_dialog: CHILD: "They say Yohualticit messes with strange things!"
city.vendedor_dialog: VENDOR: "Unbeatable deals! Only today! Buy 2, get 1 free!"
city.operario_dialog: WORKER: "The factory never stops. Three shifts a day."
city.marinheiro_dialog: SAILOR: "I've sailed the seven seas. Marélia is the safest port."
city.feirante_dialog: MARKETEER: "Straight from the farm! Fresh fruit every day!"
city.cozinheira_dialog: COOK: "Try my pastel! Family secret recipe!"
city.seguranca_dialog: SECURITY: "No ID, no entry. Those are the orders."
city.morador_dialog: RESIDENT: "It's quiet around here, but at night... better not walk alone."

quiz.subtitulo: Three billion fighters. One ranking. How much do you really know about LDI?
quiz.nexus_tag: NEXUS PHANTASM — HERALD OF THE ARENAS
quiz.timer_aviso: 30 seconds per question · speed counts toward final rank
quiz.ajuda_consultar: Who do you want to ask?
quiz.bloqueio_desc: Subscribe to unlock RECRUTA and ELITE modes, rank history and unlimited university help.
quiz.rank_desc_elite: World top. Kronos has his eyes on you.
quiz.rank_desc_ranqueado: Competitive. But still a way to top 1000.
quiz.rank_desc_aspirante: You know enough to survive. For now.
quiz.rank_desc_novato: Promising. Re-read the chapters and come back.
quiz.rank_desc_recruta: Not even Thunderbolt would have lost that badly.

blocks: I started working at 13, selling candy on buses. Back then I didn't know it, but I was living the story I would one day write.

At 17, during a history class, I realized we weren't telling the story of Brazil's native peoples — that space before the "discovery". I saw an entire universe waiting. That's when Lutas de Ilusão began to exist. I wrote in Word, printed at school, and distributed the pages. Every week people asked for the next chapter. I wrote terribly, but the story worked.

Life changed. Ten years in public service. A scholarship. I graduated, got married, had my daughter. I entered the games industry and worked on international projects — including titles like Five Nights at Freddy's and a publication that reached the God of War universe. Later I moved to traditional development. Today I'm 40 and finally publishing this story.
Lutas de Ilusão is an independent project. Every chapter, every webtoon page, every piece of music has real cost and work behind it. Supporting the work is the only way to keep it alive and growing.

helmet.home: Illusion Fight — The pain is 100% real

intro.texto:
Marelia, 1954. It hasn't stopped raining for three days.

You're not a detective.

But the dream doesn't care.

menu.confirmar:
are you sure?
this deletes everything.

final.msg_jack:
it was a pleasure working with you.
marelia will keep needing someone like you.

local.puzzle_instrucao: Solve the puzzle to investigate this location.

acusar.bloqueada: case failed. restart to try again.

caderno.desc: Thread clues collected form a pattern. Someone is connecting all the cases.
caderno.vazio: No Thread clues collected yet. Solve cases to find connections.
caderno.conspiracao_5: A name keeps coming up. Kim. The bar owner. Always present, never suspected.
caderno.conspiracao_10: The pieces are falling into place. Someone is orchestrating crime in Marelia. Someone who knows everyone involved.
caderno.conspiracao_15: The pattern is clear. Kim is at the center of everything. Every case, every death, every clue leads to the corner bar.

dormindo.texto:
You were defeated. The dream goes dark. Jack lies in the alley, rain washing blood off the asphalt.

In a few minutes, someone will find him. Or maybe no one will. This is Marelia.

fimscreen.completo: You collected enough clues. Kim was confronted with all the evidence. The dream ends with clarity — but the memories remain.
fimscreen.fragmentado: You didn't get all the clues. Kim admits to some crimes, but partially escapes. The dream ends with doubt — maybe there's more to uncover.

feed.stories_vazio:
No clues collected yet.

Investigate the case locations to reveal evidence.
feed.caderno_vazio:
"I still don't know who it is.
but every clue connects one point to another."
